_meta.scope: Search tool path only (fetch_page → extract_content → joinner). Add cases for other tools as their paths come into eval scope.
format_notes: Each case is run via run_joinner_with_scratchpad(), which bypasses build_scratchpad so we test the joinner LLM behavior independent of scratchpad rendering.
`scratchpad` is the verbatim string the joinner's user_message will contain between the Question line and the trailing `\nThought:` cue.
`must_contain_any` passes if at least one substring appears in the answer (case-insensitive).
`must_not_contain` fails if any substring appears in the answer (case-insensitive).
`expected_class` is advisory only — it goes into the review markdown so you can eyeball whether the model's posture matched intent.

cases.scratchpad:
fetch_page("https://down.example.com")
Observation: Error: tool error [fetch_page]: host fetch failed: fetch_failed: DNS lookup failed
extract_content("$1", "summary")
Observation: Error: arg coercion: inference error: extract_content.html: $1 references step that errored or was a join terminator

cases.query: what is the capital of france
